fields.name: Diriyah
fields.description: The birthplace of the Saudi Kingdom, rich with heritage and architecture

fields.name: AlUla
fields.description: Ancient tombs and sandstone mountains form one of the most iconic Saudi destinations

fields.name: Rijal Almaa
fields.description: Embark on a timeless journey to Rijal Heritage Village, a gem just 45 km from Abha. This stunning village

fields.name: Jeddah Corniche
fields.description: Modern city by the Red Sea with art, food, and beautiful seaside views

fields.name: Al Hamda Waterfall
fields.description: Outdoors Al Hamda Waterfall is one of the most beautiful natural waterfalls in Al Baha

fields.name: Nafud Al-Thuwairat
fields.description: Nafud Al-Thuwairat is an extensive desert dune field bordering the city of Al Zulfi in the Riyadh Region

fields.name: red-see
fields.description: The Marine Cave of the Red Sea is one of the most stunning and rare underwater formations along Saudi Arabia

fields.name: KAFD
fields.description: KAFD is an iconic business and lifestyle destination with state-of-the-art physical and digital infrastructure

fields.name: Al Asfar Lake
fields.description: Tucked among the golden dunes of Al Ahsa, Al Asfar Lake is one of the largest natural water bodies in the Gulf

fields.name: Maqsourat Al-Suwailim
fields.description: Maqsourat Al-Swailim is one of the most iconic heritage landmarks, blending the charm of the past with modern refinement
